message:
test(beads): add tests for catalog and handoff packages (gt-klm1q)

Covers MoleculeCatalog (Add, Get, List, Count, LoadFromFile, SaveToFile,
ToIssue, override semantics, insertion order, error cases) and handoff
pure functions (HandoffBeadTitle, status constants, currentTimestamp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
